title: Leading Thoughts About 6-Month Adventure — closing manifesto
html:
TL;DR

Written ~16 days before flying out of china (2024 12 14 departing china). A bullet-form personal creed distilling what the 6-month china chapter taught Yahir about how to live. Reads as the rough draft of six month adventure creed and a clear specimen of end of chapter reflection.

Key lines

"Love like your soul is unraveling."

"Take a chance, do it early, do it often."

"When shit goes south, stay calm, tap into inner error correcting voice, fitfo. Try to avoid these situations when possible."

"Could be a great spy, business leader, travel content creator." → career archetypes spy leader creator

"You are the stray dog walking the street and you are also a lightning bolt sent by god to set things ablaze." → stray dog and lightning bolt

"I am alone, but not lonely. My aura is magnetic." → magnetic aura

"My soul is strong and powerful, it is a beacon for others." → soul as beacon

"Don't let others dampen your fire."

"Hold no hate for others… defaulting to understanding/empathy/love is usually the right answer."

"Nothing is that serious, so when you want to put weight on something, do it with no shame and don't bullshit."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Crystallizes the identity scaffolding Yahir is bringing out of the china chapter: magnetic aura + soul as beacon + stray dog and lightning bolt form a triad, paired with the operational rule fitfo.
  • Names three career identities he plausibly inhabits (career archetypes spy leader creator) — useful triangulation against the founder mode that hardens by 2025.
  • Direct precursor to 2024 12 14 departing china — same author, same headspace, two weeks earlier, less polished.
  • The "this life is probably an illusion" line is the first explicit metaphysical wager in the China chapter — worth tracking for echoes.

Open questions

  • Was this written on a specific occasion (last big trip? particular conversation?) or just spontaneously?
  • Does the "love like your soul is unraveling" line connect to anyone in particular — valeria, someone else?

Wikilinks
